deploy: 2026-07-16 redeploy carrying the full Solidity->Stylus security realignment + H9/item20 (role events, batch bounds, granular trading breaker, batch auto-close) on stylus-sdk 0.10.8. Engine deployed via wasm-opt'd --wasm-file (opt sha256 1f2e01bc..., raw 314205 B sha256 f3f9d9c5...), activated, then initializeProduction (post-deploy init; roles -> deployer). Trading/curve params verified bit-identical to the prior public engine 0xC46E…A600 on-chain. Solidity contracts NOT yet Arbiscan-verified (deployed without --verify); oracle redeployed fresh.

PerpEngine.note: initialized (MMR=40000, admin=deployer holds DEFAULT_ADMIN+MOD); cached. wasm-opt'd artifact opt sha256 1f2e01bc... — NOT Arbiscan managed-verifiable (wasm-opt); Path-C reproducible re-derivation only (see docs/VERIFICATION.md)

CallBatcher.note: STALE — still points at the old engine 0xC46E…A600; redeploy/repoint at the new engine before use

Oracle.note: fresh TWAPOracleMiddleware (BTC), maxTimeDelta=20s, funded with 3 LINK; getPrice reverts OM2 until a signed Chainlink Data Streams v3 report is submitted

Stablecoin.note: reused USDC.e, 6 decimals (unchanged from the prior deploy)
